sectionRationale: The hero establishes authority quickly and supports both phone calls and estimate requests.
The proof strip validates local credibility immediately after the headline.

globalVisualDirection.layout: editorial asymmetry anchored by trust-heavy horizontal sections
globalVisualDirection.background: warm neutrals with dark closing conversion band
globalVisualDirection.cardStyle: thin borders and elevated review cards
globalVisualDirection.motionStyle: measured reveals with restrained hover lift

constraints: Do not copy source copy, logos, or proprietary illustrations.
Reuse structural patterns only, then restyle into the target brand system.
